meta.title: haru — Voice-first cross-language dating
meta.description: First impressions through voice intros. Messages auto-translated in the sender's cloned voice.

hero.title: Real first impressions, in their voice
hero.subtitle: Hear a short voice intro before you swipe. Messages are translated into your match's language and delivered in your own voice.

voiceIntro.label: WHY 1
voiceIntro.title: Voice intros
voiceIntro.body: More than a photo. Hear a one-line voice intro while browsing — and decide with your ears.

translation.label: WHY 2
translation.title: Auto-translation + cloned voice
translation.body: Your message arrives in your match's language — synthesized in your own cloned voice. Real conversation across languages.
translation.originalSample: Beautiful weather today — want to take a walk?

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — haru
privacy.description: How haru collects, uses, retains, and shares your data with third parties.

terms.title: Terms of Service — haru
terms.description: Terms of use, member obligations, content moderation, and liability for haru.

legal.localeNotice: Only the Korean source text is currently available. Translations will be provided after launch.

authCallback.title: Your email has been verified
authCallback.body: Head back to the haru app and sign in.
